Entry.title: Heritage Entry
Entry.description: An entry containing extracted family recipe, story, and/or wisdom.

rawText.description: The raw informal text submitted by the user

has_recipe.description: Whether the entry has an extracted recipe

recipe.description: The extracted recipe data or null

has_story.description: Whether the entry has an extracted story

story.description: The extracted story text or null

has_wisdom.description: Whether the entry has extracted wisdom

wisdom.description: The extracted wisdom text or null

createdAt.description: The ISO timestamp when the entry was created

entries/{entryId}.description: Collection of all public heritage entries
